customMethods.name: createLot
reprintLast
customMethods.script:
lotId = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.lastLabelLotId)
	if lotId is None:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("Nothing to reprint", "No recent LOT to reprint.", "warning")
		return
	appUserId = self.session.custom.appUserId
	termId = None
	try:
		termId = self.session.custom.terminal.terminalLocationId
	except:
		termId = None
	# TODO(phase4): non-Initial print-reason id is not resolvable from the view
	# (no LotLabel.getReasonIdByCode helper; view must not call system.db).
	# Passing None best-effort.
	pr = BlueRidge.Lots.LotLabel.reprint(lotId, None, appUserId, termId)
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(pr, successTitle="LTT reprinted")
	if pr and pr.get("Status"):
		self.view.custom.printFailed = False

customMethods.name: startup

props.placeholder: Scan or select a part number

props.text: Last LTT did not print. Check the printer, then tap Reprint LTT.

customMethods.name: createLot
reprintLast
customMethods.script:
lotId = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.lastLabelLotId)
	if lotId is None:

		return
	appUserId = self.session.custom.appUserId
	termId = None

	except:

	# (no LotLabel.getReasonIdByCode helper; view must not call system.db).
	# Passing None best-effort.
	pr = BlueRidge.Lots.LotLabel.reprint(lotId, None, appUserId, termId)

	if pr and pr.get("Status"):

customMethods.name: startup
customMethods.script:
# Operator gate: no logged-in operator -> open the initials popup OVER this screen.
	# Non-blocking: the page populates behind the modal; session.custom is reactive.
	if not self.session.custom.appUserId:
		system.perspective.openPopup("mpp-initials", "BlueRidge/Components/Popups/InitialsEntry", params={"popupId": "mpp-initials"}, modal=True, showCloseIcon=False, overlayDismiss=False)
